LanguageData.KT20MMACTurret.label: "Reaper" Triple 12.5mm Auto-Defense Turret
LanguageData.KT20MMACTurret.description: A 12.5mm high-rate-of-fire electric charge auto-cannon turret with three barrels. Can easily shred any incoming enemy.
LanguageData.Bullet_20MMAC.label: "Reaper" Triple 12.5mm Auto-Defense Turret Shell
LanguageData.Gun_20MMAC.label: "Reaper" Triple 12.5mm Auto-Defense Turret
LanguageData.Gun_20MMAC.description: A 12.5mm high-rate-of-fire electric charge auto-cannon turret with three barrels. Can easily shred any incoming enemy.
LanguageData.KT100MMCANNON.label: "Sledgehammer" 100mm Auto Naval Cannon
LanguageData.KT100MMCANNON.description: This 100mm turret reacts swiftly, automatically delivering firepower against hostile targets. Often appears as main armament on small warships or secondary armament on large warships. Can shoot over walls Can be manually operated
LanguageData.Gun_KT100MMCANNON.label: "Sledgehammer" 100mm Auto Naval Cannon
LanguageData.Gun_KT100MMCANNON.description: Main cannon used by heavy cruiser-class warships, extremely powerful. Rumored that some super battleships use this caliber as secondary armament. Can shoot over walls Can be manually operated
LanguageData.Bullet_KT100MMCANNON.label: "Sledgehammer" 100mm Auto Naval Cannon Shell
LanguageData.KT203MMCANNON.label: "Judgment" Twin 203mm Auto Naval Cannon
LanguageData.KT203MMCANNON.description: Main cannon used by heavy cruiser-class warships, extremely powerful. Rumored that some super battleships use this caliber as secondary armament. Can shoot over walls Can be manually operated
LanguageData.Gun_KT203MMCANNON.label: "Judgment" 203mm Auto Naval Cannon
LanguageData.Gun_KT203MMCANNON.description: Main cannon used by heavy cruiser-class warships, extremely powerful. Rumored that some super battleships use this caliber as secondary armament. Can shoot over walls Can be manually operated
LanguageData.Bullet_KT203MMCANNON.label: "Judgment" 203mm Auto Naval Cannon Shell
LanguageData.KT381MMCANNON.label: "Noston" Triple 381mm Auto Naval Cannon
LanguageData.KT381MMCANNON.description: A massive heavy naval artillery piece, originally the main gun of the Vittorio Veneto-class battleships. A single strike can cover an entire area. Can shoot over walls Can be manually operated
LanguageData.Gun_KT381MMCANNON.label: "Noston" Triple 381mm Auto Naval Cannon
LanguageData.Gun_KT381MMCANNON.description: A massive heavy naval artillery piece, originally the main gun of the Vittorio Veneto-class battleships. A single strike can cover an entire area. Can shoot over walls Can be manually operated
LanguageData.Bullet_KT381MMCANNON.label: "Noston" 381mm Auto Naval Cannon Shell
LanguageData.KTROCKETTurret.label: "Dome" Rocket Barrage Launcher
LanguageData.KTROCKETTurret.description: A small rocket barrage launcher with low accuracy but capable of quickly saturating the target area with firepower. Can shoot over walls Can be manually operated
LanguageData.Bullet_KTROCKET.label: "Dome" Rocket Barrage Launcher Rocket
LanguageData.Gun_KTROCKET.label: "Dome" Rocket Barrage Launcher
LanguageData.Gun_KTROCKET.description: A small rocket barrage launcher with low accuracy but capable of quickly saturating the target area with firepower. Can shoot over walls Can be manually operated
LanguageData.KTRAILGUN.label: "Spike" 120mm Railgun
LanguageData.KTRAILGUN.description: A very accurate large naval railgun with extremely high damage. Can shoot over walls Can be manually operated
LanguageData.Gun_KTRAILGUN.label: "Spike" 120mm Railgun
LanguageData.Gun_KTRAILGUN.description: A very accurate large naval railgun with extremely high damage. Can shoot over walls Can be manually operated
LanguageData.Bullet_KTRAILGUN.label: "Spike" 120mm Railgun Projectile
LanguageData.KTBEAMCANNON.label: "Daybeam" Ray Defense Cannon
LanguageData.KTBEAMCANNON.description: A ray defense turret with relatively short range but extreme accuracy, capable of penetrating shields.
LanguageData.Bullet_KTBEAMCANNON.label: "Daybeam" Ray Defense Cannon
LanguageData.Gun_KTBEAMCANNON.label: "Daybeam" Ray Defense Cannon
LanguageData.Gun_KTBEAMCANNON.description: A ray defense turret with relatively short range but extreme accuracy, capable of penetrating shields.
LanguageData.KTMGX94D.label: "Tsunami" Metal Storm System
LanguageData.KTMGX94D.description: A metal storm system that can instantly unleash massive amounts of ammunition, capable of shredding any hostile unit entering its range.
LanguageData.Bullet_KTMGX94D.label: "Tsunami" Metal Storm System
LanguageData.Gun_KTMGX94D.label: "Tsunami" Metal Storm System
LanguageData.Gun_KTMGX94D.description: A metal storm system that can instantly unleash massive amounts of ammunition, capable of shredding any hostile unit entering its range.
LanguageData.Gun_KTMGX94D.label: "Tsunami" Metal Storm System
LanguageData.KT57MMCANNON.label: "Scythe" 57mm Sentry Auto-cannon
LanguageData.KT57MMCANNON.description: A medium-caliber rapid-fire auto-cannon equipped with high-explosive rounds.\n\nCan be manually operated
LanguageData.Bullet_KT57MMCANNON.label: "Scythe" 57mm Sentry Auto-cannon
LanguageData.Gun_KT57MMCANNON.label: "Scythe" 57mm Sentry Auto-cannon
LanguageData.Gun_KT57MMCANNON.description: A medium-caliber rapid-fire auto-cannon equipped with high-explosive rounds\n\nCan be manually operated
LanguageData.KTLM.label: "Driftwood" Loitering Munition Launcher
LanguageData.KTLM.description: We used cloning technology and a crack scanner on a Lulu bird captured from a spaceport launch bridge, enabling mass production of these small loitering munition launchers with a core wetware installation, though accuracy isn't particularly great. Can shoot over walls Can be manually operated
LanguageData.Bullet_KTLM.label: "Driftwood" Loitering Munition
LanguageData.Gun_KTLM.label: "Driftwood" Loitering Munition Launcher
LanguageData.Gun_KTLM.description: We used cloning technology and a crack scanner on a Lulu bird captured from a spaceport launch bridge, enabling mass production of these small loitering munition launchers with a core wetware installation, though accuracy isn't particularly great. Can shoot over walls Can be manually operated
LanguageData.KTMEGARAILCANNON.label: "Divine Arrow" 480mm Railgun
LanguageData.KTMEGARAILCANNON.description: An experimental massive railgun that can penetrate any known armor, with enormous energy consumption. Can shoot over walls Can be manually operated
LanguageData.Gun_KTMEGARAILCANNON.label: "Divine Arrow" 480mm Railgun
LanguageData.Gun_KTMEGARAILCANNON.description: An experimental massive railgun that can penetrate any known armor, with enormous energy consumption. Can shoot over walls Can be manually operated
LanguageData.Bullet_KTMEGARAILCANNON.label: "Divine Arrow" 480mm Railgun Projectile
LanguageData.KTEMPMORTAR.label: "Cease" EMP Mortar
LanguageData.KTEMPMORTAR.description: Long-range automatic mortar that generates a large-area EMP upon impact, paralyzing mechanical targets. Can shoot over walls Can be manually operated
LanguageData.Bullet_KTEMPMORTAR.label: "Cease" EMP Mortar Shell
LanguageData.Gun_KTEMPMORTAR.label: "Cease" EMP Mortar
LanguageData.Gun_KTEMPMORTAR.description: Long-range automatic mortar that generates a large-area EMP upon impact, paralyzing mechanical targets. Can shoot over walls Can be manually operated
LanguageData.KTDOOMCANNON.label: "Doom" 800MM Annihilation Cannon
LanguageData.KTDOOMCANNON.description: No words needed. Everything will be annihilated. Can shoot over walls Can be manually operated
LanguageData.Gun_KTDOOMCANNON.label: "Doom" 800MM Annihilation Cannon
LanguageData.Gun_KTDOOMCANNON.description: No words needed. Everything will be annihilated. Can shoot over walls Can be manually operated
LanguageData.Bullet_KTDOOMCANNON.label: "Doom" 800MM Annihilation Cannon
LanguageData.KTShieldGeneratorBullets.label: "Horizon" Low-Angle Shield
LanguageData.KTShieldGeneratorBullets.description: A large-area low-angle shield used to intercept ground fire. Compact and lightweight, it can be placed anywhere - on a table, water dispenser, or even directly attached to the ceiling.\nAs it is a one-way shield, our turrets must be placed inside the shield to function properly.
LanguageData.KTShieldGeneratorMortar.label: "Skyline" High-Angle Shield
LanguageData.KTShieldGeneratorMortar.description: A large-area high-angle shield used to intercept mortar-class weapon fire. Compact and lightweight, it can be placed anywhere - on a table, water dispenser, or even directly attached to the ceiling.\nAs it is a one-way shield, our turrets must be placed inside the shield to function properly.
LanguageData.KTRAILAUTOGUN.label: "Stinger" 80mm Rail Auto-cannon
LanguageData.KTRAILAUTOGUN.description: A large electromagnetic rapid-fire cannon turret with extremely high accuracy. Can be manually operated The displayed range circle has a BUG and cannot show the actual range
LanguageData.Gun_KTRAILAUTOGUN.label: "Stinger" 80mm Rail Auto-cannon
LanguageData.Gun_KTRAILAUTOGUN.description: A large electromagnetic rapid-fire cannon turret with extremely high accuracy. Can be manually operated The displayed range circle has a BUG and cannot show the actual range
LanguageData.Bullet_KTRAILAUTOGUN.label: "Stinger" 80mm Rail Auto-cannon Shell
LanguageData.KTPLASMACANNON.label: "Titan" 180mm Plasma Cannon
LanguageData.KTPLASMACANNON.description: An experimental plasma weapon. While its direct hit power and accuracy are inferior to kinetic weapons, it has a larger area of effect and EMP effects. Most importantly, this type of weapon does not require reloading and can sustain output as long as power is guaranteed. Can shoot over walls Can be manually operated EMP effects
LanguageData.Gun_KTPLASMACANNON.label: "Titan" 180mm Plasma Cannon
LanguageData.Gun_KTPLASMACANNON.description: An experimental plasma weapon. While its direct hit power and accuracy are inferior to kinetic weapons, it has a larger area of effect and EMP effects. Most importantly, this type of weapon does not require reloading and can sustain output as long as power is guaranteed. Can shoot over walls Can be manually operated EMP effects
LanguageData.Bullet_KTPLASMACANNON.label: "Titan" 180mm Plasma Cannon
LanguageData.KTPLASMAAC.description: An experimental plasma weapon. While its direct hit power and accuracy are inferior to kinetic weapons, it has a larger area of effect and附带EMP effects. Most importantly, this type of weapon does not require reloading and can sustain output as long as power is guaranteed. Can be manually operated EMP effects
LanguageData.Gun_KTPLASMAAC.label: "Rapidstream" 80mm Plasma Auto-cannon
LanguageData.Gun_KTPLASMAAC.description: An experimental plasma weapon. While its direct hit power and accuracy are inferior to kinetic weapons, it has a larger area of effect and附带EMP effects. Most importantly, this type of weapon does not require reloading and can sustain output as long as power is guaranteed. Can be manually operated EMP effects
LanguageData.Bullet_KTPLASMAAC.label: "Rapidstream" 80mm Plasma Auto-cannon
LanguageData.KT_Turret_Tachyon_Lances.label: "Solar Flare" Tachyon Lance
LanguageData.KT_Turret_Tachyon_Lances.description: A super downgraded version of a certain Stellaris-era weapon, often used for mining operations. Can fire a powerful tachyon beam that affects units along its path, so strictly limit the weapon's firing angle to ensure there are no other important units in the firing path. Can be manually operated (pure manual operation recommended) Unstoppable
LanguageData.KT_TurretGun_Tachyon_Lances.label: "Solar Flare" Tachyon Lance
LanguageData.KT_TurretGun_Tachyon_Lances.description: A super downgraded version of a certain Stellaris-era weapon, often used for mining operations. Can fire a powerful tachyon beam that affects units along its path, so strictly limit the weapon's firing angle to ensure there are no other important units in the firing path. Can be manually operated (pure manual operation recommended) Unstoppable
LanguageData.KT_Tachyon_LancesBeam.label: "Solar Flare" Tachyon Lance
LanguageData.KTSHOTGUN.label: "Pacifier" Shotgun Turret
LanguageData.KTSHOTGUN.description: A shotgun turret suitable for point defense. Special projectiles can cause brief EMP effects on mechanical units, have good suppression capability against conventional units, and have a chance to stun them.
LanguageData.Bullet_KTSHOTGUN.label: "Pacifier" Shotgun Turret
LanguageData.Bullet_KTSHOTGUN.description: A shotgun turret suitable for point defense. Special projectiles can cause brief EMP effects on mechanical units, have good suppression capability against conventional units, and have a chance to stun them.
LanguageData.Gun_KTSHOTGUN.label: "Pacifier" Shotgun Turret
LanguageData.Gun_KTSHOTGUN.description: A metal storm system that can instantly unleash massive amounts of ammunition, capable of shredding any hostile unit entering its range.
LanguageData.KTLASERTURRET.label: "Radiant" Heavy Laser Cannon
LanguageData.KTLASERTURRET.description: A special laser weapon. Upon impact, it instantly detonates nearby material, creating a massive explosion and generating an EMP (I can't make this up any more). Can be manually operated EMP equipped
LanguageData.Gun_KTLASERTURRET.label: "Glow" Heavy Laser Cannon
LanguageData.Gun_KTLASERTURRET.description: A special laser weapon that instantly detonates nearby material upon impact, creating a massive explosion and generating an EMP (I can't make this up any more). Can be manually operated EMP included
LanguageData.Bullet_KTLASERTURRET.label: "Glittering" Heavy Laser Cannon
LanguageData.KTTranquilizerTurret.label: "Euthanasia" Tranquilizer Turret
LanguageData.KTTranquilizerTurret.description: This turret can fire multiple tranquilizer darts at once, quickly incapacitating targets while minimizing lethal harm (as long as the target doesn't fall forward causing secondary injury from the embedded syringes). Theoretically capable of subduing most moving creatures, even mechanoids.\n\nCan be manually operated
LanguageData.Bullet_KTTranquilizerTurret.label: "Euthanasia" Tranquilizer Turret
LanguageData.Gun_KTTranquilizerTurret.label: "Euthanasia" Tranquilizer Turret
LanguageData.Gun_KTTranquilizerTurret.description: This turret can fire multiple tranquilizer darts at once, quickly incapacitating targets while minimizing lethal harm (as long as the target doesn't fall forward causing secondary injury from the embedded syringes). Theoretically capable of subduing most moving creatures, even mechanoids, though the turret cannot distinguish whether targets can actually be tranquilized, potentially wasting ammunition.\n\nCan be manually operated
LanguageData.Gun_KTTranquilizerTurret.label: "Euthanasia" Tranquilizer Turret
LanguageData.KTMACHINEGUN.label: "Sentinel" Heavy Machine Gun Turret
LanguageData.KTMACHINEGUN.description: A fully automatic heavy machine gun turret equipped with a defensive shield, giving it far superior protection compared to turrets of the same class.
LanguageData.Bullet_KTMACHINEGUN.label: "Sentinel" Heavy Machine Gun Turret
LanguageData.Gun_KTMACHINEGUN.label: "Sentinel" Heavy Machine Gun Turret
LanguageData.Gun_KTMACHINEGUN.description: A fully automatic heavy machine gun turret equipped with a defensive shield, giving it far superior protection compared to turrets of the same class.
LanguageData.Gun_KTMACHINEGUN.label: "Sentinel" Heavy Machine Gun Turret
LanguageData.KTGRANTAUTOCANNON.label: "Hurricane" 40-Barrel 30MM Autocannon
LanguageData.KTGRANTAUTOCANNON.description: An Ork-style design that combines two 20-barrel 30MM autocannons on a single large turret, using armor-piercing ammunition. Can shoot over walls Can be manually operated
LanguageData.Gun_KTGRANTAUTOCANNON.label: "Hurricane" 40-Barrel 30MM Autocannon
LanguageData.Gun_KTGRANTAUTOCANNON.description: An Ork-style design that combines two 20-barrel 30MM autocannons on a single large turret, using armor-piercing ammunition. Can shoot over walls Can be manually operated
LanguageData.Bullet_KTGRANTAUTOCANNON.label: "Hurricane" 40-Barrel 30MM Autocannon
LanguageData.KT_kebabseal.label: "Decoration" Seal Kebab Grill
LanguageData.KT_kebabseal.description: A giant seal on a grill, but it emits a very unpleasant odor, and there's a note next to it that says "Poisonous, do not eat!"
LanguageData.KT_ammobox.label: "Decoration" Ammo Crate
LanguageData.KT_ammobox.description: For safety reasons, the shells inside have been replaced with proportional foam toys.
LanguageData.KT_missile_racks.label: "Decoration" Missile Rack
LanguageData.KT_missile_racks.description: Decorative missiles, the warheads contain only sand, but what you don't know is that our ancestors actually used giant missile colonization ships to land on new worlds.
LanguageData.KT_Barricade.label: "Defense" Tactical Barricade
LanguageData.KT_Barricade.description: This sturdy barricade provides cover for personnel, features built-in lighting, and is designed to block incoming bullets while maintaining an aesthetically pleasing appearance. The only issue is that the Pact Nation citizens it originated from were generally quite tall, but fortunately there's a step at the edge allowing colonists to use it. The barricade will block certain animals like a fence would.
LanguageData.KT_wallTV.label: 「Entertainment」Wall-Mounted Display
LanguageData.KT_wallTV.description: Wall-mounted displays can present various data to colonists in an intuitive manner, though 99% of the time they are used as televisions.
LanguageData.KT_UFGenerator.label: Hyperdimensional Power Station
LanguageData.KT_UFGenerator.description: Actually, there's no technological structure inside this device - it's completely solid iron. The power generation effect is entirely produced by direct connection to hyperdimensional entities, the shell is just decoration.
LanguageData.KT_Workbench.label: 3D Printing Workbench
LanguageData.KT_Workbench.description: According to the operation manual recorded in historical texts, this workbench can theoretically print anything with corresponding resources, even living creatures! However, due to Pact Nation treaty restrictions, pact nations can only use design blueprints approved by UF Headquarters. But some mischievous hyperdimensional entity made it possible for this workbench in the rimworld to also print delicious nutrient paste.\nBy the way, our rimworld colonists love watching the 3D printing process so much that they won't leave the machine while it's working.
LanguageData.KT_SWorkbench.label: 3D Printing Workbench (Equipment)
LanguageData.KT_SWorkbench.description: Apart from its size, there is almost no difference from the other large 3D printing workbench, but this one is specifically used for printing apparel-type equipment. (Actually, the MOD author thought one machine produced too many items and found it tedious to scroll through them all.)\nBy the way, our RimWorld colonists love watching the 3D printing process so much that they won't leave the machine while it's working.
LanguageData.KT_Maintenance_Station.label: Nanotechnology Maintenance Station
LanguageData.KT_Maintenance_Station.description: This structure nominally deploys maintenance nanobots from its top to provide continuous repair and durability enhancement for buildings and items within its range that are designated as residential zones. However, in essence, it remains merely a glowing metal box with no internal technological components. This structure increases the durability of items and buildings to 1.5 times their original durability + 200 (e.g., a wall with 500 HP will be enhanced to 1200). Equipment worn by player faction colonists can be automatically repaired, but durability values will only increase when items are placed on the ground.
